程序包 org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

A bunch of builder classes to facilitate programming of raw API.

请参阅: 说明

  • 类概要 
    类 说明
    AbstractBuilder<C extends AbstractConfig,B extends AbstractBuilder>
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractInterfaceBuilder<T extends AbstractInterfaceConfig,B extends AbstractInterfaceBuilder<T,B>>
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractMethodBuilder<T extends AbstractMethodConfig,B extends AbstractMethodBuilder<T,B>>
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractReferenceBuilder<T extends AbstractReferenceConfig,B extends AbstractReferenceBuilder<T,B>>
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractServiceBuilder<T extends AbstractServiceConfig,B extends AbstractServiceBuilder<T,B>>
    AbstractBuilder
    ApplicationBuilder
    This is a builder for build ApplicationConfig.
    ArgumentBuilder
    This is a builder for build ArgumentConfig.
    ConfigCenterBuilder
    This is a builder for build ConfigCenterConfig.
    ConsumerBuilder
    This is a builder for build ConsumerConfig.
    MetadataReportBuilder
    This is a builder for build MetadataReportConfig.
    MethodBuilder
    This is a builder for build MethodConfig.
    ModuleBuilder
    This is a builder for build ModuleConfig.
    MonitorBuilder
    This is a builder for build MonitorConfig.
    ProtocolBuilder
    This is a builder for build ProtocolConfig.
    ProviderBuilder
    This is a builder for build ProviderConfig.
    ReferenceBuilder<T>
    This is a builder for build ReferenceConfigBase.
    RegistryBuilder
    This is a builder for build RegistryConfig.
    ServiceBuilder<U>
    This is a builder for build ServiceConfigBase.

程序包org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders的说明

A bunch of builder classes to facilitate programming of raw API. TODO, these are experimental APIs and are possible to change at any time before marked as production.
